{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Fury
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[shadow madra]], layer techniques}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|, technique that creates a blue circular doorway leading to another world}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|legendary Akura clan pillar, [[Uncrowned King]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|, [[Herald]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Monarch]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura clan]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, [[Wolf Division]], [[Abidan]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|recruit}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sky's Edge fortress}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Underlord (novel)|Underlord]]
}}

''See also: [[Akura Fury Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura]] [[Fury]] is a legendary figure within the [[Akura clan]] and holds the rank of [[Herald]]. Known for his red eyes and black hair that moves like flames or seaweed, he is characterized by a boisterous, joyful, and often violent personality. He has a reputation for being unable to tolerate boredom and frequently expresses a desire for combat, once stating his preference for war over peace. As a highly skilled fighter, he has achieved the status of an [[Icon]] and possesses significant power, having spent many years preparing for his advancement. In certain contexts, he has been seen wearing the white armor of the [[Abidan]] and utilizing the techniques of the [[Wolf Division]]. His combat style is marked by speed, adaptability, and a tendency to redouble his efforts during battle. He is also recognized as a former tournament winner, a feat that has cemented his status as a legend.}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Fury]] was a legendary [[Akura clan]] pillar.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2">''Underlord'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Fury]] won the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament one year.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Fury]] is a genius in the line of [[Malice]] who failed to activate the first book.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|A [[Herald]] distinguished by his bright red eyes and wild, shadowy hair, [[Akura]] [[Fury]] is the uncle of [[Mercy]]. As the only direct descendant of [[Akura Malice]] to reach the [[Herald]] stage, he is a feared figure known for using [[shadow madra]] to singlehandedly wage war and topple entire cities. Despite having a bounty on his head from the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]], his power is immense, rivaling that of a gold [[dragon]]. During his interactions with [[Lindon]], he expressed curiosity regarding the youth's suggestions and eventually taught him how to layer techniques. Additionally, he holds the authority to select the competitors for the [[Uncrowned King]] team.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Fury]] has bright red eyes.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Fury]] is the uncle of [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Fury]] has the power to decide competitors for the [[Uncrowned King]] team.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Fury]] is a [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Fury]] has wild, shadowy hair and bright red eyes.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5">''Uncrowned'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Fury]] is the only direct descendant of [[Akura Malice]] to have reached the [[Herald]] stage.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Fury]] is known for waging war singlehandedly and toppling cities with his techniques.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Fury]] has a bounty on his head from the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The gold [[dragon]]'s power rivals [[Akura Fury]]'s.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Fury]] uses [[shadow madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Fury]] is a character who was curious about [[Lindon]]'s suggestion.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Fury]] taught [[Lindon]] how to layer techniques.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Fury]] is part of [[Mercy]]'s family and is described as uncontrollable.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Fury]] drifted higher into the air over the [[Sky's Edge]] fortress.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Fury]] is advancing to [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Fury]] is known for shirking duty unless it involves advancement or combat.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Fury]] uses a technique that creates a blue circular doorway leading to another world.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Fury]]'s technique involves a blue substance that looks like a patchwork of every shade of blue.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Fury]] cost the cults more than they expected to spend.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Akura Fury]] is someone [[Redmoon]] has crossed blows with.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Fury]] was a [[Herald]] for a long time.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A new recruit within the [[Wolf Division]], [[Akura]] [[Fury]] possesses shadow-like hair and crimson eyes. Clad in the seamless white armor of the [[Abidan]], they demonstrate a capacity to adapt quickly to new circumstances. This recruit is currently positioned on the verge of being promoted to a two-star rank.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Fury]] is a recruit in the [[Wolf Division]] on the verge of promotion to two-star.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Fury]] is a new recruit of the [[Wolf Division]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Fury]] wears the seamless white armor of the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Fury]] has shadow-like hair and crimson eyes.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Fury]] is quick to adapt.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Akura clan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
